source.format: talking-head, camera or iPhone horizontal, single take
source.tone: Opinionated, raw, personal. Not a tutorial — a person sharing what they think, built, or learned.

cuts.name: hook
cuts.editorial_lens: The boldest single moment. Must land in the first frame. Pattern interrupt or provocative claim — a stat, a failure, a hot take.

cuts.name: core
cuts.editorial_lens: One complete thought — an opinion, a tip, a lesson. No preamble. Tightest version of the take. Works as a standalone clip in a tweet.

cuts.name: segment
cuts.editorial_lens: A single complete thought with enough context to stand alone. LinkedIn rewards narrative arc; X rewards strong opinions.
